message.content:
@startuml
actor Caller
participant "ServeurDynamease" as ServeurDynamease #LightBlue
participant Asterisk #LightBlue
actor CalledDynamease

Caller -> ServeurDynamease : clickButton
activate ServeurDynamease
    ServeurDynamease <- ServeurDynamease : Verification 
    ServeurDynamease -> Asterisk  : Create conference room  
        activate Asterisk   
            return Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number_with information_of_the _caller    
            
end        
return Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number 

note right of Caller: Call_With_Trunk_Number


Asterisk <--CalledDynamease   :Call_With_Trunk_Number 


serveurdynamease<-asterisk     :When the communication is ending  

dashed line from asterisk to serveurdynamease      :communication ending  


@enduml
